hotel.name: Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort
hotel.description: A refined 76-room resort on Klong Prao Beach, Koh Chang's longest and most peaceful beach. Thai-style architecture with teakwood villas set in tropical gardens leading to the beach. Known for exceptional service (9.2/10 from 2,700+ reviews), excellent restaurant, and a romantic atmosphere. The quieter Klong Prao location feels more exclusive than busy White Sand Beach.
highlights: Klong Prao Beach — the longest, most peaceful beach on Koh Chang
Teakwood villas with Thai architectural details

similarHotels.name: KC Grande Resort & Spa
similarHotels.description: The most popular 5-star resort on Koh Chang, featuring five swimming pools, a private beach section on White Sand Beach, full-service spa, and multiple restaurants. Accommodation ranges from standard deluxe rooms to premium seaside villas. The resort straddles both sides of the road with a modern tower block and beachfront villas. Rated 8.8/10 from over 4,000 reviews.
highlights: Five swimming pools including beachfront infinity pool
Direct access to White Sand Beach with sun loungers
Full-service spa, fitness center, and multiple dining options

similarHotels.name: Centara Koh Chang Tropicana Resort
similarHotels.description: A well-managed Thai chain resort on Klong Prao Beach with two swimming pools, kids' club, spa, and beachfront dining. The Centara brand delivers consistent quality with modern rooms and reliable service. Great for families with children thanks to the kids' facilities and the calm, long beach at Klong Prao. The resort is set in tropical gardens leading to the sand.
highlights: Two swimming pools and dedicated kids' club
Beachfront location on calm Klong Prao Beach
Centara brand reliability with spa and multiple restaurants

similarHotels.name: Soneva Kiri
similarHotels.description: One of Thailand's most exclusive luxury resorts, set on a private beach on Koh Kood. Pool villas with private beaches, a chocolate room, ice cream parlor, observatory, and the famous Treepod Dining experience — eating in a bamboo pod hoisted into the treetops with food delivered by zipline. The ultimate splurge in the Trat archipelago. Reached by private charter flight from Bangkok.
highlights: Treepod Dining — eat in a bamboo pod served by zipline-riding waiters
Private beach pool villas on pristine Koh Kood
Private charter flight from Bangkok included

aiContent.hookIntro: Booking Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort without knowing its isolated Klong Prao location can leave you reliant on scooter rentals for island exploration.
aiContent.intro: Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort offers a serene escape with 76 teakwood villas blending Thai architecture and tropical gardens directly leading to Klong Prao Beach, Koh Chang's longest and most peaceful stretch. It's ideal for couples and honeymooners seeking romance and top-tier service in a quieter, more exclusive setting than bustling White Sand Beach.
whyBook: Direct access to Klong Prao Beach for peaceful walks.
Teakwood villas with authentic Thai design details.
Excellent on-site restaurant for romantic dinners.
Tropical gardens creating an exclusive atmosphere.
whyNotBook: No on-site swimming pool, relying on beach for water activities.
Limited 76 rooms mean quick sell-outs during peak season.
Quieter location requires transport to reach lively White Sand Beach.
Higher-end villas push prices up to 12,000 THB without extras like spa.
Beachfront access via gardens may feel less immediate for some.
aiContent.skipIf: Skip if you're traveling with children or prefer vibrant nightlife spots over serene isolation.
aiContent.detailedReview: Checking into Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort feels intimate, with staff offering personalized welcomes amid lush tropical gardens that guide you to your teakwood villa. The 76 rooms emphasize Thai-style architecture, featuring wooden accents and private balconies overlooking gardens or partial beach views, creating a cozy, romantic vibe without modern flashiness. Standout is the direct path to Klong Prao Beach, where you can unwind on the longest, calmest sands on Koh Chang, often empty compared to busier areas. Food at the excellent restaurant highlights fresh Thai and international dishes, with guests noting consistent quality for candlelit evenings. Service shines at 9.2/10 from 2,743 Booking.com reviews, with attentive staff handling requests like beach setups or room adjustments seamlessly, though it's more polished than overly fussy. Typical guests are couples in their 30s-50s or honeymooners, drawn to the peaceful exclusivity; you'll rarely see large groups, keeping the atmosphere romantic and low-key. Mornings start with birdsong rather than crowds, but evenings might require a short scooter ride for more dining options beyond the resort.
aiContent.locationReality: Nestled on Klong Prao Beach, the resort provides immediate beach access via its gardens, but the area's peace means White Sand Beach's shops and bars are about 20-30 minutes away by scooter or songthaew. Within a 5-minute walk, you'll find the sandy shoreline and basic beach vendors, but for waterfalls or viewpoints like Klong Plu, expect 10-15 minute drives. Ferry from Trat mainland to Koh Chang takes 30-45 minutes, plus a 20-minute transfer to the resort, totaling around 1,000-1,500 THB by private van.
localSignals: Directly on Klong Prao Beach, Koh Chang's longest stretch.
76 rooms total, focusing on villa-style accommodations.
One excellent on-site restaurant for Thai and international cuisine.
Nearest 7-Eleven is 5-10 minutes by scooter in Klong Prao village.
aiContent.travellerNote: Guests often praise the exceptional service and romantic beachfront setting but note the isolated location requires planning for off-resort activities.
bookingTips: Request a teakwood villa with garden views for more privacy.
Check Agoda for better deals on Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort than Booking.com.
Prices spike December-February high season and Songkran in April.
Verify breakfast inclusion as it's not always standard in base rates.
Book early to avoid construction notices near Klong Prao developments.

similarHotels.howDifferent: Offers multiple pools and a livelier White Sand Beach vibe, contrasting Santhiya's single-beach peaceful exclusivity.

similarHotels.name: Centara Koh Chang Tropicana Resort (2,500-5,000 THB/night (~$70-140 USD)) — A well-managed Thai chain resort on Klong Prao Beach with two swimming pools, kids' club, spa, and beachfront dining. The Centara brand deli
similarHotels.howDifferent: More family-oriented with pools and kids' club on the same beach, unlike Santhiya's couples-focused serenity.

similarHotels.name: Soneva Kiri (35,000-120,000 THB/night (~$980-3,360 USD)) — One of Thailand's most exclusive luxury resorts, set on a private beach on Koh Kood. Pool villas with private beaches, a chocolate room, ice
similarHotels.howDifferent: Ultra-luxury on nearby Koh Kood with private pools, far pricier and more secluded than Santhiya's accessible Koh Chang spot.

faq.q: What is Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort about?
faq.a: It's a 76-room luxury resort with Thai-style teakwood villas in tropical gardens leading to peaceful Klong Prao Beach, emphasizing exceptional service and romance for couples.

faq.q: What area is best to stay in Koh Chang?
faq.a: Klong Prao Beach suits those wanting peace and lengthiest sands, while White Sand Beach is ideal for convenience and vibrancy; Santhiya excels in the former's exclusivity.
Yes, for nature lovers with its beaches, jungles, and waterfalls, though it requires ferry access and suits relaxed trips over party scenes.

faq.q: What are the room types at Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort?
faq.a: Primarily teakwood villas with Thai architectural details, ranging from garden-view to beach-proximate options in 76 total rooms.

faq.q: How far is Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort from the ferry?
faq.a: About 20 minutes by transfer from the Koh Chang ferry pier after the 30-45 minute boat from Trat mainland.

faq.q: Does Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort have a pool?
faq.a: No dedicated pool mentioned; guests rely on the adjacent Klong Prao Beach for swimming.

aiContent.urgencyLine: Teakwood villas at Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort with beach access book out 1-2 months ahead for December-February high season — check today.
aiContent.methodology: We rated Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort based on guest reviews, location specifics, and amenity details from verified sources like Booking.com. We weighted service highest because it drives the 9.2/10 score and romantic appeal. Prices and availability change — always verify before booking. Last updated: 2026-04.
aiContent.metaTitle: Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort Review (2026)
aiContent.metaDescription: Santhiya Tree Koh Chang Resort in Trat offers 9.2/10 service and teakwood villas on peaceful Klong Prao Beach for couples, but its isolation needs transport planning. Read our honest review for honeymooners.
